benefits.description: BPC-157 and TB-500 helped with tissue healing after FUE; redness and soreness cleared faster than expected
GHK-Cu topical used for scalp skin texture and scalp health post hair transplant

protocol_notes: User used BPC-157 and TB-500 post-FUE hair transplant for recovery. GHK-Cu topical used for several months after surgery for scalp health. Notes that consistency matters more than stacking many compounds, and experienced issues with dosage overlap and shipping delays. Also recommends keeping TRT steady and avoiding major changes before surgery.
